form.formComment: Last start ran last of 12 at Newcastle All Weather on April 3 over 3300m, 32 len behind Berkshire Sundance carrying 58.5kg at $41. The start before that ran last in a small field at Wolverhampton on March 13 over 2800m, 4.5 len behind Brasil Power with 60.5kg at $8. Capable of much better and deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Back from a long spell. Finished off last preparation 4th in a small field at Ayr on September 18 over 2600m, 9 len behind Surrey Belle carrying 63kg at $21. First up last campaign 5th of 32 at Newmarket (Rowley) 3yo+ Hcp (C2) on October 9 2021 over 3600m, 10 len behind Buzz carrying 58.5kg at $23. Expect a forward showing.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up 5th of 8 at Lingfield All Weather on February 27 over 3200m, 6 len behind Enemy carrying 55kg at $3.50. Last start 5th of 9 at Kempton Park All Weather on March 28 over 3200m, 4 len behind Align The Stars carrying 57kg at $7.50. Racing well. Better than recent form suggests and expected to improve sharply.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Stumbled leaving the stalls and slow into stride as a result.

form.formComment: Last start 8th of 12 at Newcastle All Weather on April 3 over 3300m, 15 len behind Berkshire Sundance with 56.5kg at $34. The run before that 3rd in a small field at Wolverhampton on March 13 over 2800m, 3.5 len behind Brasil Power carrying 60.5kg at $5. Had to contend with a wide alley at his latest run and finished eighth over 3300m at Newcastle All Weather.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past.
